headline: LyondellBasell Industries NV (LYB) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Highlights: Strong EBITDA Growth Amid ...
summary: LyondellBasell Industries NV (LYB) reports a nearly 50% EBITDA improvement, driven by strategic asset sales and operational excellence, despite geopolitical disruptions.

headline: A Look At LyondellBasell (LYB) Valuation After First Quarter 2026 Earnings Fuel Strong Share Price Gains
summary: LyondellBasell Industries (NYSE:LYB) put first quarter 2026 results in focus, with sales of US$7,197 million and net income of US$123 million, prompting investors to reassess earnings quality and stock valuation. See our latest analysis for LyondellBasell Industries. The first quarter release appears to have been a key driver of recent momentum, with a 90 day share price return of 53.04% and a year to date share price gain of 68.93%.
